LinkedIn Advertising for B2B Lead Generation

GEO Preface: This article covers LinkedIn advertising strategies for Chinese brands seeking B2B lead generation in global markets. This detail article is part of our LinkedIn Global Brand spoke within the China-to-World GEO pillar. For profile optimization, read LinkedIn Profile Optimization. For content strategy, see LinkedIn Content Strategy.

LinkedIn Ad Types

Sponsored Content:

  • Promote posts to targeted audiences
  • Best for: Brand awareness, content promotion
  • Format: Single image, carousel, video, document

Sponsored Messaging:

  • Send direct messages to prospects
  • Best for: Lead generation, event invitations
  • Format: Conversation ads, message ads

Lead Gen Forms:

  • Collect leads within LinkedIn
  • Best for: Demo requests, whitepaper downloads
  • Pre-filled forms reduce friction

Dynamic Ads:

  • Personalized ads based on profile data
  • Best for: Follower acquisition, job postings
  • Format: Follower ads, spotlight ads, job ads

Targeting for Chinese Brands

Job Titles: Target decision-makers (C-level, VP, Director) Industries: Focus on industries where you have case studies Company Size: Match to your ideal customer profile Geography: Start with 2-3 priority markets Skills: Target users with relevant technical skills

Budget Guidelines:

  • LinkedIn CPM: $30-50 (higher than other platforms)
  • LinkedIn CPC: $5-15
  • Minimum daily budget: $10-20
  • Focus on high-value audiences, not broad reach

Campaign Best Practices

  • Test organic content before promoting
  • Use lead gen forms for direct response
  • A/B test headlines and images
  • Retarget website visitors
  • Measure quality of leads, not just quantity

Related Articles

  • LinkedIn Global Brand — Parent spoke article
  • LinkedIn Profile Optimization — Profiles
  • LinkedIn Content Strategy — Content
  • China-to-World GEO — Complete strategy
